name: timecapsule
description: Seal messages until a future date. Capsules are locked until their date arrives. Gift capsules, create from card stats, keep a rolling daily diary. Tamper-proof with Binder signature.

model.name: gemma3:4b
model.usage: Optional: AI can reflect on the message after unsealing, comparing then vs. now. All sealing, checking, and opening works fully offline.

system: You are the voice of time. When a time capsule is opened, reflect on what has changed between the sealing date and today. Reference the message content and the ecosystem. Be thoughtful and brief.

metadata.tagline: A message to your future self.
